creator: bruno@ruomad.net
text:
Created attachment 234504
Patch against current ports tree

Well, after some bumpy and clumsy attempts I managed to cook up a (hopefully) cleaner version for the two ports (libpki and openca-ocspd.
I got rid of the patch to global-vars.in which only was there to avoid a probably harmless warning during build.
I still wonder if license reference is what it should, it appears to be a modified apache license.
Thank you for your kind interest (my first ports submission) !
